upgrades.description: Neon Pulse deals more damage.
Neon Pulse fires more often.
Passive: move faster through horde pressure.
Passive: increase pickup radius so loose signal motes start moving sooner.
Passive: attracted signal motes fly to you faster without increasing their XP value.
Passive: periodically recall nearby loose signal motes while the level-up queue throttles burst collection.
Passive: increase maximum health.
Passive: weapon hits can critically strike for higher damage.
Passive: improve future draft odds for rare, epic, and legendary choices.
Passive: weapon kills burst outward and damage nearby enemies.
Unlock weapon: fire focused neon bolts at nearby enemies.
Unlock weapon: cast a cone of slowing prism shards.
Unlock weapon: orbit blades around the player.
Unlock weapon: form a wider guard ring around the player.
Unlock weapon: pulse a fiery burst around the player and burn enemies.
Passive: increase XP gained from gems and debug grants.
Passive: enlarge bursts, orbit paths, payload explosions, and close-range swings.
Epic passive: duplicate projectile-style attacks with extra fan shots.
Epic mutation: enlarge area weapons and sharpen global damage.
Unlock weapon: a focused beam that pierces the front line.
Unlock weapon: lob a heavy payload that detonates inside the horde.
Unlock weapon: sweep nearby enemies with arcing vector cuts.
Unlock weapon: place traps that detonate under the horde.
Unlock weapon: seed mines that punish packed enemies.
Add more prism shards to the fan pattern.
Prism shards split into secondary shards after impact.
Prism shards jump between packed enemies.
Add blades to the orbiting ward.
Photon Guard widens and adds another cutting edge.
Firewall Halo adds denser guard blades.
Push the halo outward and add another guard blade.
Firewall Halo widens into a denser spiral.
Vector Slash cuts harder.
Let Vector Slash cut through more targets.
Vector Slash recovers faster between cuts.
Add another pulse to Reactor Nova.
Repeat Reactor Nova with delayed echoes.
Reactor Nova leaves focused sigils on nearby enemies.
Neon Pulse pierces additional enemies.
Neon Pulse jumps to a nearby enemy after impact.
Neon Pulse splits after a hit.
Neon Pulse boomerangs after impact.
Passive: weapon hits leave poison damage over time.
Passive: weapon hits add bleeding damage over time.
Passive: wounded enemies can be executed by weapon hits.
Passive: heal from a portion of weapon damage.
Passive: increase starting barrier capacity.
Passive: regenerate barrier during the run.
Passive: weapon damage restores a little barrier.
Passive: commit to Neon Pulse damage and unlock Neon Tempest.
Passive: sharpen prism shards and unlock Prism Crown.
Passive: deepen orbit damage and unlock Photon Aegis.
Passive: focus burst sigils and unlock Reactor Heart.
Passive: raise Reactor weapon damage.
Passive: quicken Lumen Rail for Reactor builds.
Passive: sharpen Vector Slash and unlock Vector Waltz.
Lumen Rail deals more damage.
Lumen Rail fires more often.
Passive: carry heavier payloads for Reactor payload builds.
Passive: add a larger defensive barrier.
Lumen Rail pierces more enemies.
Throw or place additional payloads.
Payload explosions cover a wider area.
Payloads trigger from farther away.
Signal Trap and Glitch Mine deploy more hazards.
Placed hazards trigger from farther away.
Placed hazard detonations cover a wider area.
Evolution: Neon Pulse becomes a storm of chaining, forking bolts.
Evolution: Prism Volley expands into a piercing crown of shards.
Evolution: Photon Guard and Firewall Halo gain a counter-rotating shield ring that pushes back the horde.
Evolution: Reactor Nova repeats, echoes, burns longer, and targets the horde.
Evolution: Lumen Rail becomes a rapid prism that splits into angled side beams and arcing refractions.
Evolution: payload detonations seed snaring satellite danger fields.
Evolution: Vector Slash cuts forward and backward in a rapid sweeping dance.
Evolution: Signal Trap and Glitch Mine seed snaring satellite hazard fields.
